Sorry, I really do feel bad, but it had to be done.  Congratulations!  You'll be a great admin.  I love the comment on your userpage about how easy and streamlined it is to screw things up now.  That's absolutely correct.  My cat (who spends way too much time lounging around the keyboard) rolled back someone's edit when she stepped on the laptop's touchpad.  Fortunately, it was an eminently rollback-able piece of vandalism, anyway.  I no longer allow the cursor to sit parked on the ``rollback`` button while I peruse.  OK, enough rambling.  Congrats again!   `'.

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when a comment contains the word 'love', 74% were classified as non-toxic.

TASK: Predict the crowd-workers' aggregate decision. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (not toxic) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (toxic).
